---
blocks:
  - title: Experience
    entries:
      - thumbnail:
          src: /uploads/granicusinc_logo.jpeg
          alt: Granicus Logo
          blurDataURL: >-
            data:image/jpeg;base64,
        heading: Software Engineer
        subheading: Granicus • 2024-2025
        body: >
          I worked on a CRM platform using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and
          GraphQL, helping deliver new features and improvements in a
          collaborative Scrum environment. I contributed across the stack, from
          building UI components to supporting backend data workflows and
          integrations.


          One highlight was resolving a CI issue that was blocking test runs,
          which eliminated repeated pull request work and saved the team time
          each week. I also helped onboard early clients to the first production
          release, ensuring a smooth rollout of the platform.
      - heading: Front End Web Developer
        subheading: Granicus • 2021 - 2024
        body: >
          As a Front End Developer, I built and maintained high-traffic
          public-facing web applications for clients including Visit Las Vegas,
          Visit Norway, and Visit Jamaica. I worked closely with designers and
          developers to turn Figma and Adobe XD designs into responsive,
          production-ready interfaces.


          I focused on performance and reliability across multiple sites, and
          built automation scripts using Node.js and MongoDB that reduced a key
          data workflow from over an hour to just a few minutes. I also helped
          develop a system to support multilingual content for international
          websites.
    _template: sectionEntries
  - title: Education
    entries:
      - thumbnail:
          alt: ''
          blurDataURL: >-
            data:image/jpeg;base64,
        heading: Oregon State University
        subheading: ''
        body: |
          B.S. Computer Science (In Progress)
      - heading: Code Fellows

        body: |
          Advanced Software Development in Full-Stack JavaScript
      - heading: 'University of Nevada, Las Vegas'
        subheading: ''

    _template: sectionEntries
